name: ADATA GAMMIX S55 2TB PCIe Gen4 x4 M.2-2230 Solid State Drive - NVMe 1.4 Standard - 3D NAND - SLC Caching - LDPC ECC - Sequential Read up to 5,000MB/s - Sequential Write up to 3,700MB/s (SGAMMIXS55-2T-C)
